why: CHART: price pressing day-high 7138.80 for 3rd time with rising intraday lows (7120>7126>7133) and rising minute-closes (7137.1>7137.8), above VWAP-proxy 7129.8, 5m+15m momentum positive = ascending compression, up thesis. GEX CONFIRM: negative-gamma regime (breakouts trend/accelerate), NO wall overhead until 7200 barney = ~62pts clean air above breakout. Risk: no pika floor beneath, exit fast on rejection under 7133.

Failed breakout: price tagged 7139.64 then rejected back below the 7138.80 breakout level to 7138.02 within 2 min with momentum flattening to 0.00%. Thesis (clean break running to 7200) invalidated by immediate rejection back into range. No pika floor beneath in negative gamma = flush risk. Cut at ~break-even to preserve capital.

CHART: confirmed breakout WITH follow-through now — 3 consecutive rising candles (7139.6>7141.7>7142.5) to fresh day-high 7142.46, cleared old range-high 7138.80, 15m momentum expanding to +0.12%, above VWAP 7131. Up-trend, not chop. GEX CONFIRM: negative-gamma fuels trend; king flipped UP to 7200 barney = upside target/magnet, ~58pts air to it, no wall between. Manage: cap into 7200, exit on momentum roll.

Momentum roll: uptrend topped at 7143.90 and stalled, 5-min momentum flipped negative (-0.02%), first red candle (10:40) after the run, price backed to 7141.72. Continuation-to-7200 thesis stalled; no floor beneath in negative gamma = flush risk. Exit near break-even per pre-stated plan (cap into 7200 OR exit on momentum roll).

CHART: first decisive breakdown of the day — price cracked BELOW VWAP-proxy 7133.74 on expanding-momentum red candle (11:00: 7137.9>7133.1) and held below for 4 min, now 7133.08 at 54% range, momentum negative+expanding (5m -0.07%, 15m -0.11%) after failed 7143.9 top. Down thesis. GEX CONFIRM: net gamma deepened to -32M (downside fuel), barney ceiling 7135 capping just overhead, clean air down to 7085 pika floor (~48pts). Manage: cover into 7085, exit if reclaims above ~7136.

Cap winner into opposing node: flush ran from 7133.08 entry to 7126.45 (~7pt, +0.09% underlying) straight into the day-low support 7120.42 while 5-min momentum decelerated (-0.12%>-0.08%). Day-low is the next opposing node; on this choppy grind day 0DTE winners round-trip, so bank the biggest edge of the day here rather than risk a bounce off the day-low. Pika floor building at 7060 also warns dealers may defend lower.

CHART: day-low break CONFIRMED with continuation — broke prior day-low 7120.42 on hard 11:50 candle (-13pt) and made NEW low 7117.85 with strongest momentum of the day (5m -0.20%, 15m -0.17%), far below VWAP 7132.5. Genuine down impulse, not flush-and-reverse. GEX CONFIRM: negative gamma (-37M) fuels flush; nearest floor is 7060 pika (~58pts air below), ceiling 7135 far overhead. Manage: cover into 7100/7060 support zone, exit if momentum reverses above ~7125.

Failed breakdown / cut loss: after entering the day-low break at 7117.85 (chased 2 candles into the flush), price immediately snapped back 6pts to 7123.59 with 5-min momentum flipping positive (+0.08%) and approaching my 7125 stop. Continuation-to-7100 thesis invalidated — the flush exhausted at the low and is reverting toward VWAP/7135 barney. Cut small rather than bleed. Lesson: chasing the extended move at the low was poor R:R.
